title: MOG-Ab-associated optic neuritis with concurrent GFAP-Ab positivity following tislelizumab-based treatment: a case report.
abstract: To investigate the clinical characteristics and therapeutic management of myelin oligodendrocyte glycoprotein antibody (MOG-Ab)-related optic neuritis (ON), a rare neurological immune-related adverse event (irAE) associated with the programmed death-1 (PD-1) inhibitor tislelizumab.
